query:
SELECT c.code, c.title, l.id as lessonId, l.title as lessonTitle, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_questions q WHERE q.lessonId = l.id) as quizCount
FROM courses c
JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_questions q WHERE q.lessonId = l.id) = 0
ORDER BY c.code, l.lessonOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.code, c.title, l.id as lessonId, l.title as lessonTitle, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_questions q WHERE q.lessonId = l.id) as quizCount
FROM courses c
JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_questions q WHERE q.lessonId = l.id) = 0
ORDER BY c.code, l.lessonOrder;
